revision.text: {{Userbox |border-c = black |border-s = 1 |id-c = White |id-s = {{#if:{{{1|}}}|12|14}} |id-fc = White |info-c = White |info-s = 8 |info-fc = black |id = [[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2-en.svg|35px]] |info = This user is one of the [[Wikipedia:List of Wikipedians by number of edits|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}}'''}} most active English Wikipedians]] of all time. }}<noinclude> {{clear}} ==See also== *{{tl|User MAW}} [[Category:Statistics user templates|MAWcustom]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
